targets.query:
from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: -1h)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "occupied" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> group()
 |> last()

completed = from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: -24h)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "occupancy_sessions" and r._field == "duration_s" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> mean()
 |> set(key: "source", value: "1_completed")

ongoing = from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: -1h)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "session_s" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> last()
 |> set(key: "source", value: "2_ongoing")

union(tables: [completed, ongoing])
 |> group()
 |> sort(columns: ["source"])
 |> limit(n: 1)

from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: -24h)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "occupied" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> group()
 |> mean()

from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: -1h)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "lux" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> group()
 |> last()

from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "noise" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> group()
 |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "lux" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> group()
 |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value" and (r.event == "high_noise_event" or r.event == "poor_lighting_event"))
 |> keep(columns: ["_time", "event", "_value"])
 |> group()
 |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "desksense")
 |> range(start: -30d)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "forecast_metrics" and r.desk == "${desk}")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "forecast_value" or r._field == "mae")
 |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
 |> group(columns: ["metric", "model", "_field"])
 |> last()
 |> group()
 |> pivot(rowKey: ["metric", "model"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
 |> keep(columns: ["metric", "model", "forecast_value", "mae"])
 |> rename(columns: {metric: "Signal", model: "Model", forecast_value: "Forecast value", mae: "MAE"})
